Zero Hunger.reason: The topic "物價指數與通貨膨脹" (Price Indices and Inflation) is tangentially related to food price volatility (Target 2.c), but the course does not focus on food security.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Covers "財政政策" (Fiscal Policy), a key tool for achieving greater equality (Target 10.4), and "金融機構" (Financial Institutions), relevant to financial regulation (Target 10.5).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Analyzes key economic institutions like the "中央銀行" (Central Bank) and "政府的總體經濟政策" (government's macroeconomic policies), relating to developing effective institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Focus on "政府的總體經濟政策" provides the foundation for understanding global macroeconomic stability (Target 17.13) and domestic resource mobilization via "財政政策" (Target 17.1).
